entity_extraction_template: For each row, extract the value of '纲领' as a Policy_Program entity node.
relation_extraction_template: For each time column, create: (Policy_Program) -[HAS_BUDGET {year: X, status: Y, unit: Z}]-> (value). Example time columns: {2022-23, 实际, 百万元}; {2023-24, 原来预算, 百万元}; {2023-24, 修订, 百万元}.
extraction_constraints: Each row represents one Policy_Program entity identified by '纲领'.
Time columns encode fiscal year, status, and unit in compound headers.
Parse compound headers (newline-separated) into year/status/unit attributes.
Create one HAS_BUDGET relation per (entity, time_column) pair.
Skip cells with null or non-numeric values.
